The development of Apple A5 is overseen by Dan Riccio, who serves as Apple’s Senior Vice President of Hardware Engineering and has been in charge of the company’s hardware engineering efforts since 2005. Apple A5 is a dual-core, 32-bit, and 64-bit capable CPU designed to work with the Apple A5X GPU.
